C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COURT AND BOTH COUNSEL DISCUSS IN LIMINE MOTIONS, COURT'S RULINGS READ ON THE RECORD. TRIAL CONT'D TO 10/4/94 AT 1:30 PM.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PO, ANA MARIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1845 LINCOLN WAY, NO 2, SF, CA $1,694.08 RENT, $14,591.38 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,285.46, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS AND ATTYS FEES PURSUANT TO COST BILL.

U. D. CASE JUDEGE GEORGE CHOPPELAS, RPTR. DEBBIE NEVILLE, CLK. R. CONTRERAS 2PM C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. ALL PRESENT. COURT PRELIMINARILY INSTRUCTS PROSPECTIVE JURORS COURT AND ATTORNIES VOIR DIRE PROSPECTIVE JURORS. EACH SIDE PASSES FOR CAUSE. EACH SIDE EXERCIZES PEREMPTORY CHALLENGES. JURY SWORN: 1) YEE, ROSE T, 2) CASTRO, ONDINE, 3) HUYNH, MY-NGO T, 4) MORSE, BARBARA E., 5) CZERWONKA, HELENA J, 6) BANKS, SAMANTHA A, 7) MANCINI, RITA L, 8) GAIDA, CHESTER T, 9) GANTAN, CATALINO D, 10) DONOHUE, ROBERT E., 11) WILLIAMS, LINDA F. 12) KUROSE, DAVID S, A-1) FENTON, ROSE, A-2) BORELLI, JOANNA L. 3:15 PM COURT RECESS UNTIL 10AM, WED, 10/5/94.
